17: class ProfileScreen extends ConsumerStatefulWidget {
18:   const ProfileScreen({super.key});
19: 
20:   @override
21:   ConsumerState<ProfileScreen> createState() => _ProfileScreenState();
22: }
23: 
24: class _ProfileScreenState extends ConsumerState<ProfileScreen> {
25:   bool _linked = false;
26:   int? _anilistUserId;
27:   bool _loadingStatus = true;
28:   bool _linking = false;
29:   StreamSubscription<String>? _codeSubscription;
30: 
31:   @override
32:   void initState() {
33:     super.initState();
34:     aniListDeepLinkService.initialize();
35:     _codeSubscription = aniListDeepLinkService.onAuthCode.listen(_handleAuthCode);
36:     _loadLinkStatus();
37:   }
38: 
39:   @override
40:   void dispose() {
41:     _codeSubscription?.cancel();
42:     super.dispose();
43:   }
44: 
45:   Future<void> _loadLinkStatus() async {
46:     final status = await ref.read(animeApiProvider).getAniListLinkStatus();
47:     if (!mounted) return;
48:     setState(() {
49:       _linked = status.linked;
50:       _anilistUserId = status.anilistUserId;
51:       _loadingStatus = false;
52:     });
53:   }
54: 
55:   Future<void> _handleAuthCode(String code) async {
56:     setState(() => _linking = true);
57:     final anilistUserId = await ref.read(animeApiProvider).linkAniList(code);
58:     if (!mounted) return;
59:     setState(() {
60:       _linking = false;
61:       if (anilistUserId != null) {
62:         _linked = true;
63:         _anilistUserId = anilistUserId;
64:       }
65:     });
66:     if (mounted) {
67:       ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
68:         SnackBar(
69:           content: Text(anilistUserId != null
70:               ? 'AniList account linked'
71:               : 'Failed to link AniList account'),
72:         ),
73:       );
74:     }
75:   }
76: 
77:   Future<void> _unlink() async {
78:     final success = await ref.read(animeApiProvider).unlinkAniList();
79:     if (!mounted) return;
80:     if (success) {
81:       setState(() {
82:         _linked = false;
83:         _anilistUserId = null;
84:       });
85:     }
86:   }
87: 
88:   Future<void> _startLinking() async {
89:     final url = Uri.parse(buildAniListAuthorizeUrl());
90:     await launchUrl(url, mode: LaunchMode.externalApplication);
91:   }
92: 
93:   @override
94:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
95:     final authState = ref.watch(authControllerProvider);
96:     final theme = Theme.of(context);
97: 
98:     return Scaffold(
99:       appBar: AppBar(
100:         leading: const AppBackButton(),
101:         automaticallyImplyLeading: false,
102:         title: const Text('Profile'),
103:       ),
104:       body: Center(
105:         child: Padding(
106:           padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24),
107:           child: Column(
108:             mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
109:             children: [
110:               Text(
111:                 authState.user?.name ?? 'User',
112:                 style: GoogleFonts.cinzel(
113:                   fontSize: 24,
114:                   fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
115:                   color: theme.colorScheme.onSurface,
116:                 ),
117:               ),
118:               const SizedBox(height: 8),
119:               Text(
120:                 authState.user?.email ?? '',
121:                 style: TextStyle(
122:                   fontSize: 16,
123:                   color: theme.colorScheme.onSurface.withAlpha(179),
124:                 ),
125:               ),
126:               if (authState.isGuest) ...[
127:                 const SizedBox(height: 8),
128:                 Text(
129:                   'Guest',
130:                   style: TextStyle(
131:                     fontSize: 14,
132:                     color: theme.colorScheme.secondary,
133:                   ),
134:                 ),
135:               ],
136:               const SizedBox(height: 32),
137:               Text('Appearance', style: theme.textTheme.titleMedium),
138:               const SizedBox(height: 8),
139:               SizedBox(
140:                 width: double.infinity,
141:                 child: SegmentedButton<ThemeMode>(
142:                   segments: const [
143:                     ButtonSegment(value: ThemeMode.light, icon: Icon(Icons.light_mode), label: Text('Light')),
144:                     ButtonSegment(value: ThemeMode.dark, icon: Icon(Icons.dark_mode), label: Text('Dark')),
145:                     ButtonSegment(value: ThemeMode.system, icon: Icon(Icons.brightness_auto), label: Text('System')),
146:                   ],
147:                   selected: {ref.watch(themeModeProvider)},
148:                   onSelectionChanged: (selected) {
149:                     ref.read(themeModeProvider.notifier).setThemeMode(selected.first);
150:                   },
151:                 ),
152:               ),
153:               const SizedBox(height: 32),
154:               Text('AniList Sync', style: theme.textTheme.titleMedium),
155:               const SizedBox(height: 8),
156:               if (_loadingStatus)
157:                 const SizedBox(
158:                   height: 24,
159:                   width: 24,
160:                   child: CircularProgressIndicator(strokeWidth: 2),
161:                 )
162:               else if (_linked)
163:                 Column(
164:                   mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
165:                   children: [
166:                     Text(
167:                       'Linked as AniList user #$_anilistUserId',
168:                       style: TextStyle(color: theme.colorScheme.onSurface.withAlpha(179)),
169:                     ),
170:                     const SizedBox(height: 8),
171:                     OutlinedButton(
172:                       onPressed: _unlink,
173:                       child: const Text('Unlink AniList'),
174:                     ),
175:                   ],
176:                 )
177:               else
178:                 OutlinedButton.icon(
179:                   onPressed: _linking ? null : _startLinking,
180:                   icon: _linking
181:                       ? const SizedBox(
182:                           height: 16,
183:                           width: 16,
184:                           child: CircularProgressIndicator(strokeWidth: 2),
185:                         )
186:                       : const Icon(Icons.link),

188:                 ),

state.title: dart format lib/features/auth/presentation/profile_screen.dart

part.text:
The profile screen has been redesigned with:

- **Scrollable `ListView`** with `EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 24)` layout
- **Hero header**: `CircleAvatar` radius 48 showing first letter, `GoogleFonts.cinzel` size 28 for name, muted email text below, and a pill-shaped "Guest" chip for guest users
- **Glass cards**: "Appearance" and "AniList Sync" wrapped in `Colors.white.withAlpha(10)` containers with `BorderRadius.circular(20)` and 20px padding
- **Styled SegmentedButton** via `SegmentedButtonThemeData` with custom `styleFrom` (translucent selection, rounded corners)
- **Premium AniList indicator**: green-tinted chip with check icon and border when linked
- **Logout button**: full-width, 56px tall, outline style with subtle red tint and `BorderRadius.circular(16)`
- All existing auth controller, url_launcher, and deep link logic preserved untouched
